# 🪐 Zohal Uploader Bot - Update Guide & Auto-Fix Command

This file contains the details of the latest optimizations and a **one-time copy and run command** to directly apply all updates, fix the ImportErrors, configure the default port to `3002`, and start the bot on your VPS.

---

### 🚀 Key Fixes & Optimizations Applied:
1. **ImportError StopTransmission Fix**: Resolved the Pyrogram startup crash by importing `StopTransmission` directly from `pyrogram.errors.exceptions.stop_transmission`.
2. **Default Port changed to 3002**: Updated the web server default listener, installers, CLI, and helper scripts to default to port `3002`.
3. **Resilient Proxy Tests**: Fixed the proxy tester using fallback APIs (`freeipapi.com`, `ipapi.co`, `ip-api.com`), added User-Agent header, and set `trust_env=False` to ignore system proxy incompatibilities.
4. **Extreme Upload Speed**: Added a Pyrogram concurrency patch (16 parallel workers for large uploads) and an asynchronous prefetch queue to download S3 files while uploading them in parallel.
5. **Folder Navigation & Pagination**: Implemented folder navigation and page-by-page file listing directly in the Telegram UI.

---

### 💻 VPS One-Time Copy & Run Command:
Copy the entire block below, paste it into your VPS SSH terminal, and press **Enter**. It will stop the service, apply all file updates, restart the service, and print the status:

```bash
systemctl stop zohal && apt-get install -y unzip && echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/patch.zip && unzip -o /tmp/patch.zip -d /root/zohal-uploader/ && rm /tmp/patch.zip && systemctl daemon-reload && systemctl start zohal && systemctl status zohal
```
